generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HorizontalStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Two stepper motors for horizontal movement of the gantry crane puck"
]

instance VerticalElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for vertical positioning of container pucks in the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PositionEncoderHorizontal : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Incremental encoder for horizontal position tracking of the gantry crane (accuracy ±0.1-1mm)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HorizontalPositionData
]

instance PositionEncoderVertical : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Incremental encoder for vertical position tracking of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VerticalPositionData
]

instance VelocityTachometerHorizontal : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Optical tachometer for real-time speed measurement of horizontal movement (sampling ≥100Hz)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HorizontalVelocityData
]

instance ForceLoadCell : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load cell for measuring puck weight/acceleration (±1-5% of full scale)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadForceData
]

instance ProximityUltrasonicSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ultrasonic sensor for collision avoidance in gantry crane workspace"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CollisionDetectionData
]

instance RaspberryPiSensorAggregator : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Single-board computer aggregating data from all sensors via Ethernet/Wi-Fi with NTP timestamping"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AggregatedSensorData
]

instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for workspace environmental monitoring (if applicable)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalData
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance HorizontalPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionEncoderHorizontal
]

instance VerticalPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionEncoderVertical
]

instance HorizontalVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocityTachometerHorizontal
]

instance LoadForceData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ForceLoadCell
]

instance CollisionDetectionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ProximityUltrasonicSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance AggregatedSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiSensorAggregator
]

// C5: Data Storage
instance RealTimePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High-frequency position data (1000 samples/sec) for real-time trajectory validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HorizontalPositionData, VerticalPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance RealTimeVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High-frequency velocity data (≥100Hz) for dynamic control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HorizontalVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance LoadForceHistory : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical load/force measurements (±1-5% accuracy) for predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadForceData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance EnvironmentalHistory : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series environmental data (temperature/humidity) for workspace conditions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CollisionDetectionLogs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Collision avoidance event logs from proximity sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CollisionDetectionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance AggregatedSystemData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Centralized sensor data aggregation with NTP timestamps"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AggregatedSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

// C10: Models
instance GantryKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic model implementing forward/backward kinematics and payload dynamics for gantry crane motion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance CADGantryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360-generated CAD model representing the gantry crane geometry and assembly"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaDashboard
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based model enabling real-time or offline optimization of crane motion trajectories for efficiency/safety"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance FaultDetectionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Empirical model for proactive fault identification (e.g., motor failures, actuator misalignment)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonGantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Python module implementing the digital twin's ad-hoc architecture including kinematic models, control algorithms, and service interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryKinematicModel, TrajectoryOptimizationModel, FaultDetectionModel
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing historical operational data (sensor logs, control signals) for long-term analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimePositionData, RealTimeVelocityData, LoadForceHistory, EnvironmentalHistory, CollisionDetectionLogs, AggregatedSystemData
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating real-time data streaming between physical crane and digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables HorizontalPositionData, VerticalPositionData, HorizontalVelocityData, LoadForceData, CollisionDetectionData, EnvironmentalData
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization framework packaging digital twin components (Python services, databases) for reproducibility and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables PythonGantryLib, TimescaleDB
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based dashboard for real-time visualization of crane trajectories, error metrics, and operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimePositionData, RealTimeVelocityData, LoadForceHistory, EnvironmentalHistory, CollisionDetectionLogs, AggregatedSystemData
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service comparing simulated vs. actual measurements to detect kinematic mismatches and sensor drift"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service ensuring real-time synchronization between physical and digital twin states"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Proactive identification of faults (motor failures, actuator misalignment) via empirical fault detection algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time or offline optimization of crane motion trajectories for efficiency, energy savings, or safety"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores operational data (position, velocity, load) for post-hoc analysis and predictive modeling"
    DTDFVocab:provides WearPredictionInsight
]

instance ClosedLoopFeedbackService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Feeds control signals back to physical crane to correct deviations via embedded controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionCorrectionAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of crane state (real-time position tracking, motion paths) for operators/researchers"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateVisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of kinematic mismatches or sensor drift between physical and digital twin states"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of faults (e.g., motor failures, actuator misalignment) requiring maintenance intervention"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimized motion trajectory adjustments for efficiency/safety improvements"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WearPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of component wear based on historical operational data"
]

instance MotionCorrectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic correction of trajectory deviations via closed-loop feedback control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of current crane state (position, velocity, load) for operational monitoring"
]

// C1: Environment
instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HorizontalStepperMotor, VerticalElectromagnet,
        PositionEncoderHorizontal, PositionEncoderVertical,
        VelocityTachometerHorizontal, ForceLoadCell,
        ProximityUltrasonicSensor, EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor,
        RaspberryPiSensorAggregator
]

instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PythonGantryLib, TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker,
        DockerContainerization, GrafanaDashboard,
        ContinuousValidationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **digital-to-physical interaction** is mediated by the **Control Application** (Python) and **Trajectory Generator Service**, which:
- **Command Types**: Executes **optimal movement trajectories** (derived from kinematics) with **zero residual swinging motion** (per the **Trajectory Generator Service**).
- **Control Message Formats**: Likely formatted via **MQTT** (same broker as physical-to-virtual data) or direct API calls to the **Physical Crane Interface**.
- **Validation & Authentication**: Implicitly validated by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which compares simulated vs. real trajectories. No explicit authentication mechanisms are described, but the **MQTT Broker** may enforce message integrity.
- **Feedback Systems**: The **Continuous Validation Service** provides **distance metrics** (e.g., Euclidean error) between simulated and executed trajectories, triggering alerts if thresholds are breached (via the **Dashboard**).
- **Conflict Resolution**: Not explicitly detailed; assumed to rely on **real-time error correction** (e.g., adjusting trajectories dynamically if validation fails).
- **Command Execution Confirmation**: Implied by the **Logging Application**’s continuous monitoring and the **Dashboard**’s real-time visualization of deviations.
"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** system employs pre-recorded data for synchronization, implying a **batch-based twinning approach** with no real-time updates. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar does not specify explicit time-scale details, but its operational context involves **continuous sensor data acquisition** (via Raspberry-Pi sensors) for real-time indoor air quality monitoring, enabling **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** with minimal latency. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system operates in a **continuous mode**, characterized by **real-time synchronization** between physical and digital components, where the digital twin continuously logs, compares, and updates state based on sensor inputs (e.g., container movement tracking)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplifies a **self-adaptive digital twin constellation** where the physical greenhouse and its digital twin **mutually adapt** in real-time via **InfluxDB/ActiveMQ**. The **containerized virtual machines** ensure scalability, but the **orchestration** is ad-hoc, relying on **manual deployment** of pre-recorded VM images. **No formal architecture patterns** (e.g., microservices, event sourcing) are specified, though **data-driven adaptation** is implied.

The **Air Quality Management** uses **AutomationML** for digital twin integration, enabling **runtime visualization/simulation/prediction** via **Microsoft Azure**. The **Raspberry Pi sensors** feed data into a **centralized Azure pipeline**, with **coordination** handled by **Azure IoT Hub** (implied) for interoperability. The **decentralized sensor network** coordinates via **AutomationML standards**, but **system-wide orchestration** is abstracted under Azure’s managed services.

The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** (C4 Model context) would require **component-level orchestration** (e.g., crane arm vs. puck transport) via **C4-style diagrams**, but no explicit patterns are detailed. The **ad-hoc approach** suggests **event-driven coordination** (e.g., MQTT) for real-time synchronization, with **resource management** delegated to containerization (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes) for scalability.

**No explicit mention** of orchestration patterns in the documents implies **ad-hoc, decentralized constellations** with **shared data stores (InfluxDB/Azure)** and **message brokers (ActiveMQ)** for coordination.
"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "
    **Model Fidelity Requirements**:
    - **Physical Twin Fidelity**: High-fidelity for real-time control (e.g., 95%+ accuracy in position tracking).
    - **Simulation Twin Fidelity**: Moderate fidelity for testing (e.g., 80–95% accuracy in predicted trajectories).
    - **Dynamic Range**: Models must handle operational extremes (e.g., full load vs. empty puck).

    **Validation/Verification Methods**:
    - **Physical Validation**: Cross-check sensor data with manual measurements (e.g., laser displacement meters).
    - **Model Validation**: Compare simulation outputs with real-world crane performance (e.g., path deviation metrics).
    - **Uncertainty Quantification**:
      - **Sensor Noise**: Statistical analysis of encoder/load cell variability.
      - **Model Errors**: Monte Carlo simulations for actuator/control algorithm uncertainties.
    - **Error Detection/Correction**:
      - **Anomaly Detection**: Machine learning models flag sensor outliers (e.g., sudden spikes in force).
      - **Self-Calibration**: Auto-tuning of PID gains based on real-time feedback.
    - **Quality Assurance**:
      - **Calibration Protocols**: Regular sensor recalibration (e.g., weekly).
      - **Test Cases**: Predefined scenarios (e.g., emergency stops, load transfers) for validation.
      - **Audit Logs**: Immutable records of model/data changes for traceability.
  "
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin system** operates on a **single-host architecture** deployed on a **personal computer (PC)**, with all components (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard, and services) containerized using **Docker**. The **MQTT Broker** facilitates inter-service communication, but the specific protocol (e.g., MQTT v3.1.1) is not detailed. The network topology is **point-to-point** between the PC and physical crane controllers, with no mention of distributed or edge computing.

No explicit bandwidth/latency requirements are specified, but the system’s real-time requirements imply **low-latency communication** (e.g., <100 ms) for control loops. Reliability is ensured by the **TimescaleDB**’s time-series data persistence and the **Continuous Validation Service**’s threshold-based alerts. Security protocols are **not explicitly mentioned**, but the system’s containerized deployment (Docker) and Python-based services suggest basic isolation and access controls (e.g., role-based permissions for operators/researchers).
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin system** is deployed on a **single on-premise personal computer (PC)** with no cloud or edge components. The **Database (TimescaleDB)**, **MQTT Broker**, and **Grafana Dashboard** are containerized using **Docker**, while the **Control Application**, **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service** are bundled into a **Python module named gantrylib** for deployment.

Computational requirements are implied by the system’s real-time processing needs (e.g., trajectory generation at **kinematics-model-dependent frequencies**, likely <1 kHz for lab-scale operations). Storage requirements are managed by the **TimescaleDB**, which stores time-series data for historical analysis. The system supports **single-instance deployment** (no horizontal scaling) due to its lab-scale scale. Availability/reliability is not quantified, but the containerized architecture ensures modular updates and fault isolation. No explicit uptime guarantees (e.g., 99.9%) are mentioned.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** system integrates with external systems via **InfluxDB** (database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker), but no explicit protocols (e.g., REST, MQTT) or dependencies on external enterprise systems are specified. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar integrates with external systems through **AutomationML** (standard for digital twin interoperability) and **Microsoft Azure** (cloud-based services), though details on data exchange protocols or interoperability standards are not provided. The **Gantry Crane** system’s architecture is visualized via **C4 Model diagrams** (for software architecture), but no explicit horizontal integration details (e.g., OPC UA, Modbus) or external system dependencies are mentioned. No evidence of REST APIs, CLI tools, or IoT Edge integration is present in the documents."
]
